result.summary: The page is mostly intact, but there is a significant overlap issue where the 'SCROLL DOWN' indicator sits on top of the legal disclaimer text, plus a missing icon in the bottom navigation and readability concerns with the fine print.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' overlay (with chevron arrows) is rendered directly on top of the legal terms & conditions paragraph, obscuring several lines of the disclaimer text and making it impossible to read.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'SCROLL DOWN' indicator below the legal text or add spacing/margin so it does not overlap the disclaimer content.

issues.description: The 'SPORTS' item in the bottom navigation bar has a text label but no icon, while all other nav items (Casino, Live Casino, Poker, Promos, Support) display icons. The label is also vertically misaligned compared to its neighbors.
issues.suggestion: Add the missing sports icon asset (or fix the broken image reference) and align the label consistently with the other navigation items.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and set in dark blue on a bright yellow/orange background, resulting in poor readability, especially where the background gradient changes.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size of the legal text and ensure sufficient color contrast, or place it on a solid, uniform background.

issues.description: Promotional graphics (slot machine phone, coins, baseball) are cropped at the left and right edges of the hero image, which can look unintentional on this viewport width.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the hero artwork's responsive scaling or safe margins so key decorative elements are not awkwardly clipped at the screen edges.
